subject: Re: For Jeffrey Epstein
body:
definitely


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, May 14, 2008 9:36:22 AM
Subject: FW: For Jeffrey Epstein


 
 
From:egneurocog@aol.com [mailto:egneurocog@aol.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, May 13, 2008 5:30 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: For Jeffrey Epstein
 
Greetings Jeffrey,

Someone will be passing through town whom you may be interested in meeting. Nicholas (Colly) Myers is the former (in fact, first) CEO of Symbian, a British software company. Colly and his older brother Sir David Potter are good examples of the "best and the brightest" leaving university-based science to become high-tech entrepreneurs. Colly was the chief software architect at Symbian, and distinct parallels exist between the evolution of his interests and those of Jeff Hawkins. Colly and I intersected some time ago, and we are discussing a collaboration converging his talent in software design and my knowledge of the brain - not dissimilar from our discussions. Colly will be in New York very briefly in the end of May and I wonder if you would like to meet him if your schedules mesh. Please let me know.

Best wishes,
Elkhonon

Elkhonon Goldberg, Ph.D., ABPP

Clinical Professor of Neurology
New York University School of Medicine

Diplomate
American Board of Professional Psychology
in Clinical Neuropsychology

315 West 57th Street
Suite 401
New York, NY 10019
USA

tel +1 212 541 6412
fax +1 212 246 8916
egneurocog@aol.com
elkhonon.goldberg@med.nyu.edu
www.elkhonongoldberg.com


-----Original Message-----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: egneurocog@aol.com
Sent: Fri, 9 May 2008 4:30 pm
Subject: RE: Jeffrey Epstein
Let me speak with Jeffrey and I will get back to you!
 
From:egneurocog@aol.com [mailto:egneurocog@aol.com] 
Sent: Friday, May 09, 2008 4:11 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: Jeffrey Epstein
 
Hi Lesley,

As you may know, Jeffrey and I have continued our discussions about launching a brain modeling project. I would like to introduce to Jeffrey Prof. Larry Abbott, Director of the Theoretical Neurobiology Program at Columbia University and the author of the authoritative text on computational neuroscience. Please let me know if we can set up a meeting at Jeffrey's convenience.

Best wishes,
EG

Elkhonon Goldberg, Ph.D., ABPP

Clinical Professor of Neurology
New York University School of Medicine

Diplomate
American Board of Professional Psychology
in Clinical Neuropsychology

315 West 57th Street
Suite 401
New York, NY 10019
USA

tel +1 212 541 6412
fax +1 212 246 8916
egneurocog@aol.com
elkhonon.goldberg@med.nyu.edu
www.elkhonongoldberg.com

-----Original Message-----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: egneurocog@aol.com
Sent: Tue, 6 May 2008 10:25 am
Subject: Jeffrey Epstein
Hello Dr. Goldberg.  Jeffrey would like to speak with you.  Could you please give him a call at the office?  212 750 9895.
 
Thanks, Lesley
